description.value: Price 7,315 gp; Aura faint transmutation; CL 3rd; Weight 4 lbs. DESCRIPTION This steel-tined +1 trident can be commanded to lengthen or shorten its haft (or return to its normal length) as a swift action. It is a two-handed reach weapon when extended but cannot be thrown. If shortened, it can be wielded as a light weapon or hurled as a javelin. Feats or class abilities that apply to tridents apply to a fighter’s fork in any form. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells shrink item; Cost 3,815 gp
